title: The Problem Solvers | Anton Osika at Lovable
summary: Lovable is a platform that allows anyone to build software through natural conversation without requiring an engineering team. The platform reached millions of users within two months of launch. Anton Osika emphasizes that trust, built through craft and care, serves as a key competitive advantage, strengthened through partnership with Anthropic.
